summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 01/12/2025
Iron ore futures con nued to climb today, with the most-traded contract I2601 hi ng a high of 803.5 and finally se lingat 801, up 1.14% slightly from the previous trading day. Traders showed high enthusiasm for selling, while steel mills adopted a cau ous wait-and-see approach with moderate purchase willingness. The market transac on atmosphere was moderate.
